Name: LOAD_BALANCER_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the configuration of the FPS load balancer.

Fields.Name: Low FPS Threshold
Fields.Description: If the FPS falls below this amount, then the load balancer level increases by 1.

Fields.Name: High FPS Threshold
Fields.Description: If the FPS exceeds this amount, then the load balancer level reduces by 1.

Fields.Name: Low FPS Threshold Count
Fields.Description: If the FPS falls below this amount for the specified number of consecutive frames, the load balancer level increases by 1.

Fields.Name: High FPS Threshold Count
Fields.Description: If the FPS exceeds this amount for the specified number of consecutive frames, the load balancer level reduces by 1.

Fields.Name: Sleep Duration after Level Reduction
Fields.Description: The number of frames to ignore monitoring for after a load balancer level reduction.

Fields.Name: Sleep Duration after Level Increment
Fields.Description: The number of frames to ignore monitoring for after a load balancer level increment.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Post Process: Light Shafts
Fields.Description: The filter level to use for this post process effect.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Post Process: Bloom
Fields.Description: The filter level to use for this post process effect.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Post Process: Glow
Fields.Description: The filter level to use for this post process effect.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Post Process: Anti-Aliasing
Fields.Description: The filter level to use for this post process effect.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Post Process: Screen-space Ambient Occulusion
Fields.Description: The filter level to use for this post process effect.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Post Process: Depth of Field
Fields.Description: The filter level to use for this post process effect.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Post Process: Motion Blur
Fields.Description: The filter level to use for this post process effect.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Post Process: Motion Blur Iteration Reduction
Fields.Description: The reduction amount to apply to motion blur iterations.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Shadow: Blur
Fields.Description: The blur level to use for shadows.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Particles: Emitter Count
Fields.Description: The reduction amount to apply to SFX emitter count.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Particles: Reflection
Fields.Description: The reduction amount to apply to SFX reflection.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Particles: Water Interaction
Fields.Description: The reduction amount to apply to SFX water interaction.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Particles: Glow
Fields.Description: The reduction amount to apply to SFX glow.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Particles: Distortion
Fields.Description: The reduction amount to apply to SFX distortion.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Particles: Soft Sprites
Fields.Description: The reduction amount to apply to SFX soft sprites.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Particles: Light Shafts
Fields.Description: The reduction amount to apply to SFX light shafts.

Fields.Name: Reduction - Particles: Render Distance
Fields.Description: Adjust the render distance of SFX in the reduced buffer based on SFX distance.

Fields.Name: Dynamic Resolution
Fields.Description: The level of dynamic resolution to use.

Fields.Name: Shadow Resolution: Cascade 0 (Half)
Fields.Description: Reduce the resolution of shadows (cascade 0) by half.

Fields.Name: Shadow Resolution: Cascade 1 (Half)
Fields.Description: Reduce the resolution of shadows (cascade 1) by half.

Fields.Name: Player: Disable Wetness (Host)
Fields.Description: Disable wetness for the host player.

Fields.Name: Player: Disable Wetness (Client)
Fields.Description: Disable wetness for the client players.

Fields.Name: Player: Disable Wetness (Enemy)
Fields.Description: Disable wetness for enemies.

Fields.Name: Dynamic Resolution: Minimum %
Fields.Description: The minimum limit for dynamic resolution.

Fields.Name: Dynamic Resolution: Maximum %
Fields.Description: The maximum limit for dynamic resolution.

Fields.Name: Particles: Cartridge Emittance Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which cartridges will be generated, if the distance between the generation location and the camera is within this value. In metres.

Fields.Name: Particles: Low FPS Threshold
Fields.Description: If the FPS falls below this amount due to SFX, then the load balancer level increases by 1.

Fields.Name: Dynamic Resolution: Minimum Change Duration
Fields.Description: The minimum change duration for each reduction step when reducing the resolution due to poor performance.

Fields.Name: Dynamic Resolution: Start Resolution
Fields.Description: The initial resolution percentage for dynamic resolution (based on the the used resolution).
